title: French banking giant Crédit Agricole launches EURXT euro stablecoin
summary: Crédit Agricole’s CACEIS launches a euro-pegged stablecoin on Ethereum with 20.02 million tokens issued, targeting institutional flows and tokenized fund access.

title: Bank of Korea governor outlines tokenized bond vision, unified ledger plan
summary: The Bank of Korea’s governor praised tokenized government bonds for easing the issuance and management of government debt during a panel discussion at the ECB Forum.

title: Warsh Taps Ex-BOE Chief King for New Fed Communications Task Force
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh has tapped former Bank of England Governor Mervyn King to co-chair the US central bank’s new task force on communications.

title: Stocks Bounce on Manufacturing, Warsh’s Remarks: Markets Wrap
summary: Signs of economic strength alongside easing price pressures spurred a rebound in stocks, with Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh saying inflation risks have come down.

title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Sets Reverse Split for July 2
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Sets Reverse Split for July 2
American Bitcoin (Nasdaq: ABTC) will implement a 1-for-15 reverse stock split effective July 2, reducing its outstanding shares to about 73 million ahead of reverse split-adjusted trading beginning July 6.

title: Forward Industries Shares Spike as Leading Solana Treasury Adds $38 Million in SOL
summary: Shares in top Solana treasury firm Forward Industries are jumping Wedesday after announcing that it added over 500,000 SOL to its stash.

title: Morning Minute: Major New Stablecoin Launch Shakes Incumbents
summary: Open USD takes a shot at USDC and USDT, with backing from heavy hitters including Visa, Mastercard and Google.

title: Forward Industries jumps 17% after expanding Solana treasury to 7.55 million SOL
summary: Forward Industries holds more SOL than the next three largest publicly traded Solana treasury companies combined.

title: Solana-based prediction market app on Phantom wallet launches
summary: “Prediction markets are one of the most powerful applications you can build on a high-performance blockchain,” said Solana Foundation.

title: Donald Trump made more than $1bn last year in return to presidency
summary: US president also earned hundreds of thousands of dollars from licensing of Bibles, watches and perfume

title: Five things we learnt from Trump’s financial disclosure
summary: The US president earned more than $1bn from digital currency interests as well as real estate and stock trades
